story.soThat: notification gönderirken channel logic'i abstract edilsin

tasks.task: Notification entity ve enum'ları hazırla Notification entity Prisma schema'da mevcut olduğunu doğrula NotificationChannel enum kullanılabilir olduğunu kontrol et (Story 5.6'da oluşturulmuş) NotificationType enum oluştur (verification, password-reset, otp, general, etc.)

NotificationService oluştur src/modules/notifications/services/notification.service.ts oluştur send(userID, domainID, type, title, message, data?): Promise<void> method sendToEmailChannel() private method sendToSmsChannel() private method sendToPushChannel() private method (stub) Error handling: Her channel için try-catch, partial success handling Async sending: Fire-and-forget pattern

NotificationController oluştur src/modules/notifications/controllers/notification.controller.ts oluştur POST /notifications/send endpoint GET /users/me/notifications endpoint (optional, history) Swagger decorators ekle
NotificationsModule yapılandırması notifications.module.ts güncelle NotificationService provider olarak ekle NotificationController controller olarak ekle Dependencies import et

Testing Unit test NotificationService.send() (multi-channel sending) Unit test NotificationService.send() (preferences filtering) Unit test NotificationService.send() (partial success handling) Unit test NotificationService.send() (async fire-and-forget) Integration test POST /notifications/send Integration test GET /users/me/notifications E2E test notification sending flow

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Notification entity oluşturulmuş - Fields: id, domainID, userID, type, channel, title, message, data (JSON), sent (boolean), sentAt, createdAt - Indexes: [domainID, userID], [type], [createdAt] - Entity zaten Prisma schema'da mevcut

NotificationService oluşturulmuş - src/modules/notifications/services/notification.service.ts - send(userID, domainID, type, title, message, data?): Promise<void> method - User notification preferences fetch - Enabled channels'a gönder - Notification history database'e kaydet

Multi-channel sending implemented - EMAIL enabled → MailService.sendEmail() veya MailService.sendTemplateEmail() - SMS enabled → SmsService.sendSms() - PUSH enabled → FirebaseService.sendPush() (stub) - Her channel için ayrı Notification record
Failure handling implemented - Partial success OK - Her channel attempt'i Notification entity'ye kaydedilir - Failure durumunda error log edilir - Async sending: non-blocking
Notification history tracking - Her notification attempt Notification entity'ye kaydedilir - Fields: domainID, userID, type, channel, title, message, data, sent, sentAt

docs.doc: Unified Notification Service story breakdown ve acceptance criteria. Multi-channel sending (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH) based on user preferences.
Complete AC specifications (AC-5.7.1 through AC-5.7.5). Unified notification flow diagram ve multi-channel orchestration pattern.
Controller-Service pattern: NotificationController → NotificationService → Multi-channel orchestration. Controller HTTP layer, Service business logic.
Multi-tenancy pattern: @DomainID decorator + domainID filtering in all queries. Notification entity includes domainID field.
Unified notification flow: User preferences fetch → Enabled channels filter → Multi-channel sending → History tracking. Partial success handling.
NotificationPreferencesService.getPreferences() method mevcut. Default preferences: All channels enabled. Lazy initialization pattern.
Async fire-and-forget pattern: Communication operations diğer flow'ları bloklamıyor. Error handling: Log errors, don't throw exceptions.
Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Unit test coverage: 80%+ for services. Mock dependencies (NotificationPreferencesService, MailService, SmsService).
Integration test setup: Test database, PrismaService injection. API integration tests with Supertest.
E2E test critical user journeys: Full flow (authenticate → send notification → verify history). Multi-channel notification testing.

file.reason: User notification preferences fetch için kullanılacak. Method signature: getPreferences(userID: string, domainID: string): Promise<NotificationPreference[]>. Default preferences oluşturma desteği var.
Notification channel enum (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH). Story 5.6'da oluşturulmuş, NotificationService'de kullanılacak.
EMAIL channel için kullanılacak. Method signature: sendEmail(to: string, subject: string, html: string, text?: string): Promise<void>. Provider-agnostic email sending.
EMAIL channel için template-based email gönderimi. Method signature: sendTemplateEmail(to: string, subject: string, templateName: string, data: object): Promise<void>.
SMS channel için kullanılacak. Method signature: sendSms(domainID: string, phoneNumber: string, message: string, type: SmsType): Promise<SMS>. Database tracking ile SMS gönderimi.
NotificationsModule mevcut. NotificationService ve NotificationController eklenecek. MailModule ve SmsModule import edilmeli.

Notification entity Prisma schema'da mevcut. Fields: id, domainID, userID, type, channel, title, message, data (JSON), sent (boolean), sentAt, createdAt. Indexes: [domainID], [userID], [domainID, userID].
NotificationPreference entity Prisma schema'da mevcut. Unique constraint: [domainID, userID, channel]. NotificationPreferencesService bu entity'yi kullanıyor.

constraints.constraint: Controller-Service Pattern: NotificationController → NotificationService → Multi-channel orchestration. Controller HTTP layer, Service business logic.
Multi-Tenancy Pattern: @DomainID decorator + domainID filtering in all queries. Notification entity includes domainID field. All queries filtered by domainID from JWT token.
Async Fire-and-Forget Pattern: Notification gönderimi async fire-and-forget pattern ile implement edilir (await yok, catch ile error handling). Communication operations diğer flow'ları bloklamıyor.
Partial Success Handling: Bir channel başarısız olsa bile diğerleri gönderilmeye devam eder. Her channel attempt'i Notification entity'ye kaydedilir (sent: true/false).
Error Handling: Failure durumunda error log edilir (Sentry'ye gönderilir). Notification record'da sent: false olarak işaretlenir. Exception throw edilmez.
File Naming: kebab-case (notification.service.ts, notification.controller.ts). Classes: PascalCase (NotificationService, NotificationController).
Module Structure: src/modules/notifications/services/, src/modules/notifications/controllers/, src/modules/notifications/dto/, src/modules/notifications/enums/
DTO Transformation: Response DTOs use @Expose() decorator. plainToInstance with excludeExtraneousValues: true.
Testing: Unit tests 80%+ coverage. Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Mock dependencies (NotificationPreferencesService, MailService, SmsService).

interface.name: MailService.sendEmail()
interface.signature: sendEmail(to: string, subject: string, html: string, text?: string): Promise<void>

interface.name: MailService.sendTemplateEmail()
interface.signature: sendTemplateEmail(to: string, subject: string, templateName: string, data: object): Promise<void>

interface.name: SmsService.sendSms()
interface.signature: sendSms(domainID: string, phoneNumber: string, message: string, type: SmsType): Promise<SMS>

interface.name: GET /users/me/notifications
interface.signature: GET /users/me/notifications - Query: page, limit, Response: NotificationResDto[]

tests.standards: Unit tests: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. 80%+ coverage for services. Mock dependencies (NotificationPreferencesService, MailService, SmsService, PrismaService). Use Jest testing framework. Integration tests: Test database setup, PrismaService injection, API integration tests with Supertest. E2E tests: Full flow testing (authenticate → send notification → verify history). Multi-channel notification testing, preferences filtering, partial success handling.
tests.locations: Unit tests: src/modules/notifications/services/notification.service.spec.ts Integration tests: test/notifications.integration.spec.ts (to be created) E2E tests: test/notifications.e2e-spec.ts (to be created)

ideas.test: Unit test: NotificationService.send() → Multi-channel sending (EMAIL, SMS enabled). Mock NotificationPreferencesService.getPreferences(), MailService.sendEmail(), SmsService.sendSms(). Verify all enabled channels called.
Unit test: NotificationService.send() → Preferences filtering (only EMAIL enabled). Mock preferences with only EMAIL enabled. Verify SMS and PUSH not called.

Unit test: NotificationService.send() → Partial success handling (EMAIL succeeds, SMS fails). Mock MailService.sendEmail() success, SmsService.sendSms() failure. Verify Notification records created with correct sent status.
Unit test: NotificationService.send() → Async fire-and-forget pattern (non-blocking). Verify method returns immediately without awaiting channel sends.
Unit test: NotificationService.send() → Notification history tracking. Verify Notification records created for each channel attempt with correct fields.
Integration test: POST /notifications/send → Sends notification to enabled channels (authenticated). Create test user, authenticate, call endpoint, verify notifications sent.
Integration test: GET /users/me/notifications → Returns user notification history (pagination). Create notifications, call endpoint with pagination, verify response.
E2E test: Multi-channel notification → EMAIL, SMS, PUSH channels all enabled. Full flow: authenticate → send notification → verify all channels called → verify history.
E2E test: Preferences filtering → Only EMAIL enabled, SMS and PUSH skipped. Update preferences, send notification, verify only EMAIL sent.
E2E test: Partial success → EMAIL succeeds, SMS fails, notification history recorded. Mock SMS failure, verify EMAIL sent, verify Notification records with correct sent status.
